title: Skipping Rope for Kids, 2.6M Adjustable Children Jump Rope with Wooden Handle, Child Jumping Rope for Girls and Boys
features: 【High Quality】 Ergonomic design, durable, safety kids jump rope, easy to carry. Use this cute jump rope, your kids can use indoors or outdoors. Perfect for children over 3 years old.
【Adjustable Kids Jump Rope】 The total length of this toddler jump rope is 2.6m/7.8ft, kids can adjust the length freely according to their needs.
【Wooden Handle Jump Rope】Made of high quality natural wooden handle, smooth surface and clear texture. Non-slip wooden handles for a comfortable and secure grip.

【Fitness & Exercise Rope】Jumping rope regularly helps to improve the child's heart rate, and physical coordination, weight loss, which is of great help to the child's health. Regular exercise boosts brain growth.

【A Practical Gift】 Ideal birthday, Christmas and other festival gift for boys and girls, encouraging healthy habits and physical activity. With this kids skipping rope you can have fun games with your family and friends.
description: This 7ft jump rope kids is designed for boys and girls, it's a good way to encourage kids to get outside and begin to develop healthy habits at a young age. The benefits of skipping: ① Skipping on the body's sensitivity, physical posture, balance, coordination and flexibility have a good role in promoting. It is beneficial to development, especially lower limb strength. ② Regular skipping can help children grow taller. ③ Skipping is an effective and economical way to burn fat. Product Details: Material: cotton rope + wood handle Total Length: 7ft/2.6m Package included: 1 ×jump rope kids
